mapper.sql: c.id, c.major_id, c.grade_id, c.class_code, c.class_name, c.advisor_id, c.advisor_name, c.status, c.remark, c.deleted, c.create_time, c.update_time, m.college, m.major_name, g.grade_name
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO academic_class (major_id, grade_id, class_code, class_name, advisor_id, advisor_name, status, remark) VALUES (#{majorId}, #{gradeId}, #{classCode}, #{className}, #{advisorId}, #{advisorName}, #{status}, #{remark})
mapper.update: UPDATE academic_class SET major_id=#{majorId}, grade_id=#{gradeId}, class_code=#{classCode}, class_name=#{className}, advisor_id=#{advisorId}, advisor_name=#{advisorName}, status=#{status}, remark=#{remark}, update_time=NOW() WHERE id=#{id} AND deleted=0
UPDATE academic_class SET deleted=1, update_time=NOW() WHERE id=#{id} AND deleted=0
mapper.select: SELECT FROM academic_class c LEFT JOIN academic_major m ON m.id=c.major_id AND m.deleted=0 LEFT JOIN academic_grade g ON g.id=c.grade_id AND g.deleted=0 WHERE c.id=#{id} AND c.deleted=0

SELECT FROM academic_class c LEFT JOIN academic_major m ON m.id=c.major_id AND m.deleted=0 LEFT JOIN academic_grade g ON g.id=c.grade_id AND g.deleted=0 WHERE c.class_code=#{classCode} AND c.deleted=0 LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM academic_class c LEFT JOIN academic_major m ON m.id=c.major_id AND m.deleted=0 LEFT JOIN academic_grade g ON g.id=c.grade_id AND g.deleted=0

SELECT FROM academic_class c LEFT JOIN academic_major m ON m.id=c.major_id AND m.deleted=0 LEFT JOIN academic_grade g ON g.id=c.grade_id AND g.deleted=0
ORDER BY c.create_time DESC, c.id DESC LIMIT #{query.offset}, #{query.limit}

SELECT FROM academic_class c LEFT JOIN academic_major m ON m.id=c.major_id AND m.deleted=0 LEFT JOIN academic_grade g ON g.id=c.grade_id AND g.deleted=0 WHERE c.deleted=0 AND c.status=1 ORDER BY g.enrollment_year DESC, m.major_name ASC, c.class_name ASC
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM academic_student_record WHERE class_id=#{id} AND deleted=0
